mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcements (title, summary, content, category, status, pinned, related_campaign_id, published_at, expires_at, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, #{pinned}, #{relatedCampaignId}, #{publishedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcements SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, pinned = #{pinned}, related_campaign_id = #{relatedCampaignId}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE announcements SET status = #{status}, published_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' THEN COALESCE(published_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE published_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcements SET pinned = #{pinned}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (published_at IS NULL OR published_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY pinned DESC, published_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM announcements ORDER BY pinned DESC, updated_at DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (published_at IS NULL OR published_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY pinned DESC, published_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
